## Description
Soil is the mixture of minerals, organic matter, gases, liquids, and the myriad of organisms that together support plant life.

## Characteristics

| Attribute      | Value |
|--------:|:------|
|Edible:|false|
|Type:|Waste|
|Form:|Solid|
